payload.title: fix: replace hero screenshot with real campus photos, delete screenshot files
payload.body: Homepage hero used a 2.8MB screenshot of Google Maps (maps1-campus.png) as the first slide. Replace with real campus photos that already exist in assets/images/institute/ and delete the screenshot files.

evidence: views/public/home.php: replaced maps1-campus.png with students-campus.jpg as hero slide 1
Replaced esic-students.jpg with student-group.jpg as slide 3
Hero now shows only real photographs of the campus and students
